% ============================================================
%  NoteForge base preamble — English (report + fontspec, engine: tectonic/XeLaTeX)
%  Generated by note-preamble. Defines math macros + the COMMON box
%  set (review/exam/key/note). A style profile is appended below to add
%  the discipline content boxes. Do not add \begin{document} here —
%  master.tex owns the document body.
% ============================================================
\documentclass[11pt,a4paper,oneside]{report}

\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage[top=2.4cm,bottom=2.4cm,left=2.6cm,right=2.6cm]{geometry}
\usepackage[dvipsnames]{xcolor}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb,mathtools}
\usepackage{bm}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{tcolorbox}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{setspace}
\usepackage{parskip}

\tcbuselibrary{breakable,skins}

\hypersetup{colorlinks=true, linkcolor=NavyBlue, urlcolor=NavyBlue, citecolor=NavyBlue}

\setstretch{1.12}
\allowdisplaybreaks
\setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=1.8em,topsep=2pt,itemsep=1pt}
\setlist[enumerate]{leftmargin=2.0em,topsep=2pt,itemsep=1pt}

\titleformat{\section}{\Large\bfseries\color{NavyBlue}}{\thesection.}{0.5em}{}
\titleformat{\subsection}{\large\bfseries}{\thesubsection}{0.5em}{}
\titleformat{\subsubsection}{\normalsize\bfseries\color{black!75}}{\thesubsubsection}{0.5em}{}

% ---------- math convenience macros (shared by every profile) ----------
\newcommand{\dd}{\mathrm{d}}
\newcommand{\ee}{\mathrm{e}}
\newcommand{\ii}{\mathrm{i}}
\newcommand{\unit}[1]{\,\mathrm{#1}}
\newcommand{\abs}[1]{\left| #1 \right|}
\newcommand{\ev}[1]{\left\langle #1 \right\rangle}
\newcommand{\pdv}[2]{\frac{\partial #1}{\partial #2}}
\newcommand{\dv}[2]{\frac{\dd #1}{\dd #2}}

% ============================================================
%  COMMON boxes (available in every profile: review / exam / key / note)
% ============================================================
\newtcolorbox{reviewbox}{breakable, colback=gray!7!white, colframe=black!60,
  title=\textbf{Chapter Recap Card}, sharp corners, boxrule=0.6pt, left=4pt,right=4pt,top=3pt,bottom=3pt}
\newtcolorbox{exambox}[1]{breakable, colback=orange!4!white, colframe=red!55!black,
  title=\textbf{Exam Question \textbar\ #1}, sharp corners, boxrule=0.9pt, left=4pt,right=4pt,top=3pt,bottom=3pt}
\newtcolorbox{keybox}{breakable, colback=yellow!12!white, colframe=yellow!60!black!80,
  title=\textbf{Solution}, sharp corners, boxrule=0.8pt, left=4pt,right=4pt,top=3pt,bottom=3pt}
\newtcolorbox{notebox}{breakable, colback=black!4!white, colframe=black!45,
  title=\textbf{Note}, sharp corners, boxrule=0.6pt, left=4pt,right=4pt,top=3pt,bottom=3pt}

% ---- a profile content-box snippet is appended below this line by note-preamble ----
